var el=document.querySelector('[html-display]');var comp=el.components['html-display'];comp.data.render='text';comp.data.mode='raw';if(comp._clockInterval)clearInterval(comp._clockInterval);comp._clockInterval=setInterval(function(){var now=new Date();var utc=now.toISOString().replace('T',' ').split('.')[0]+' UTC';var html='

'+utc+'

MISSION ELAPSED: '+Math.floor((now-new Date('2025-01-01'))/86400000)+' DAYS

ORBITAL PERIOD: 92.4 MIN

';comp.data.html=html;comp.renderHTML(html);},1000);console.log('[job:clock] started');
